title: Vara, Paksha and Karana Computation Model

paksha.note: Record must carry normalized angle and tithi index.

karana.boundary_rule: Karana changes every 6 degrees of Moon-Sun angular difference.

vara.rule_status: final observance-specific day-boundary rule deferred to festival/observance stage
vara.note: Record must state whether civil local date or sunrise-based boundary was applied.
